title: Mace Backport
description: Backports the Mace, Wind Charge, and all 1.21 mace enchantments to  Minecraft Forge 1.16.5. Includes smash attacks, wind explosions and unique enchantments like Thor.
body:
Mace Mod 1.21 Backport brings the new combat mechanics from Minecraft 1.21 to Forge 1.16.5.

Features:
- Mace weapon with heavy smash attack
- Wind Charge projectile
- Wind explosions with knockback
- Full crafting recipes
- Enchantments from Minecraft 1.21:
  - Density
  - Breach
  - Wind Burst
- Extra custom enchantment:
  - Thor (summons lightning)

The mod recreates the feel of Minecraft 1.21 combat while staying fully compatible with Forge 1.16.5.
